channel.title: Welcome to my website! on atecon's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to my website! on atecon's blog

item.title: About myself
item.description: I’m an economist currently working as a Senior Data Scientist at www.otto.de – Europe’s 2nd largest e-commerce shop after Amazon. I love the idea of open-source, and try to contribute to that idea. I have written or co-authored quite a number of packages for the open-source statistics and econometrics library named Gretl. Here is an overview about my Gretl packages. Additionally, I am an official package reviewer for Gretl. Apart from that, I have co-founded the Gretl Association and currently I act as the vice-chairman of it ;-)
